quiz_subtitle: Unveil the shadows within to unlock personalized gear and guidance.

questions.text: Which role calls to you most powerfully?
questions.rationale: This core question establishes the user's primary dynamic preference, which is the foundation for all product and content recommendations.

questions.text: How would you describe your journey so far?

options.label: I'm comfortable and seeking to deepen my practice.

questions.rationale: Segmenting by experience level allows for tailored educational content, from '101' guides for beginners to advanced technique articles for experts.

questions.text: What is the primary motivation behind your fantasy?

options.label: The beauty and artistry of the aesthetic.

questions.rationale: Understanding the user's 'why' helps tailor the marketing angle—focusing on control, feeling, beauty, or intimacy.

questions.text: Choose the aesthetic that best captures your imagination.

options.label: Gothic & Ornate: Velvet, intricate leather, dark lace.
Modern & Minimalist: Sleek lines, steel, functional design.
Primal & Raw: Heavy leather, rope, forged metal.
Luxurious & Opulent: Silk, gold hardware, bespoke pieces.

questions.rationale: Visual preference is a key driver for high-ticket purchases. This question directly informs which product collections to showcase.

questions.text: Which tools of the trade intrigue you most? (Choose up to two)
questions.rationale: This question provides direct insight into product categories the user is actively interested in, creating opportunities for targeted campaigns.

questions.text: What level of intensity are you drawn to?
questions.rationale: Gauges the user's play style to recommend appropriate gear, from soft leather to heavy-duty implements, and relevant safety content.

questions.text: How do you approach acquiring new pieces for your collection?

options.label: I'm building a foundation with essential, quality basics.
I invest in 'forever pieces' that are both art and tool.
I'm looking for unique, experimental items to try.
I seek the most luxurious, high-end craftsmanship.

questions.rationale: This question segments users by purchasing intent and potential lifetime value, separating bargain hunters from high-end investors.

questions.text: How do you prefer to learn and be inspired?

options.label: Through detailed guides and how-to articles.
Through evocative stories and fictional scenes.
Through stunning visuals and product showcases.
Through community discussions and expert interviews.

questions.rationale: Determines the optimal content format for the welcome flow and ongoing marketing to maximize engagement.

segments.name: The Sovereign
segments.description: An experienced Dominant who commands with authority and invests in the finest, most opulent gear to reflect their status.

segments.name: The Devotee
segments.description: A thoughtful submissive who finds beauty in surrender, seeking deep emotional connection and ritualistic play.

segments.name: The Neophyte
segments.description: New and curious, you are eager to learn the fundamentals and are looking for guidance and foundational gear to start your journey safely.

segments.name: The Artisan
segments.description: A creative explorer of both roles, you are driven by the discovery of new sensations and enjoy experimenting with a variety of tools.

segments.name: The Aestheticist
segments.description: For you, the visual is paramount. You curate a collection of beautiful, statement-making apparel and gear that is an extension of your identity.

segments.name: The Primalist
segments.description: You are drawn to the raw, visceral, and cathartic aspects of play, preferring heavy-duty, durable gear for intense scenes.

segments.name: The Scholar
segments.description: You approach your interest from an intellectual perspective, seeking to understand the psychology, safety, and techniques before you practice.

segments.name: The Sensualist
segments.description: Your focus is on heightened sensory experiences and intimate connection, preferring soft materials, blindfolds, and gentle teasing.

email_capture_step.headline: Your Archetype is Ready
email_capture_step.subhead: Enter your email to unlock your personalized results, product recommendations, and exclusive content tailored to your unique fantasy.
email_capture_step.incentive: Plus, receive 10% OFF your first order and our free guide: 'The 7 Pillars of Dark Fantasy'.
email_capture_step.consent_text: By entering your email, you agree to receive marketing communications from Dark Fantasy. You may unsubscribe at any time. We honor your privacy and discretion.

shopify_implementation_notes: To implement this quiz on Shopify, use a dedicated quiz app like Octane AI, Prehook, or a custom-built solution. Configure the app to pass each selected option's 'segment_tag' as a custom property or tag to the user's Klaviyo profile upon email submission. In Klaviyo, create the eight segments defined above, using the logic 'Profile has tag X AND profile has tag Y'. Finally, create four distinct welcome flow triggers (default, luxury, beginner, wellness) that activate when a user is added to one of the corresponding segments, ensuring each new subscriber receives a hyper-tailored onboarding experience.
